title: Cozy Flaky Saudia Garlic Stir-fry
description: A cozy and high-protein-friendly dish featuring garlic-infused canned tomatoes and a flaky texture.

ingredients.name: Protein source (chicken or tofu)
ingredients.notes: Chopped if chicken, cubed if tofu

ingredients.name: Sautéed onion
ingredients.notes: Optional for added flavor and texture

ingredients.name: Olive oil
ingredients.notes: For sautéing and drizzling over the top

instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add garlic and onion if using, sauté until fragrant (about 2 minutes).
Add canned tomatoes and stir to release juices. Cover and simmer gently for about 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Fold in protein source and continue to cook until heated through and sauce is slightly reduced.
Serve hot as a side dish or over rice.
